ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., General, Primary) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date when the election took place */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  "mail_in_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for mail-in voting */,
  "mail_in_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for mail-in voting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "municipality_name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the municipality is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the municipality */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the municipality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality it belongs to */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the ward */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the ward (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wards_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward it belongs to */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the precinct (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  "polling_location" TEXT /* Location of the polling station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election they are contesting */,
  "candidate_status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate (e.g., Running, Withdrawn, Elected) */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the candidate */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total votes cast in the precinct */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total registered voters in the precinct */,
  "early_voting_count" INTEGER /* Number of early votes cast */,
  "mail_in_voting_count" INTEGER /* Number of mail-in votes cast */,
  "in_person_voting_count" INTEGER /* Number of in-person votes cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where votes are cast */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate who received the votes */,
  "number_of_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate in the precinct */,
  "vote_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., Early, Mail-in, In-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blanks" (
  "blank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blank record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "num_blanks" INTEGER /* Number of blank votes recorded */,
  "early_voting_blanks" INTEGER /* Number of blank early votes */,
  "mail_in_voting_blanks" INTEGER /* Number of blank mail-in votes */,
  "in_person_voting_blanks" INTEGER /* Number of blank in-person votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blanks_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blanks_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter stat record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total registered voters in the precinct */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of registered voters (e.g., 18-25, 26-35) */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of registered voters (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution of registered voters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_statistics_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_statistics_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
